data.title: Predicting $10.50 price for LINK by March after bounce. Short-term target is $9.50 with critical support at $8.51.
data.description: Summary of LINK Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the target price for LINK is set at $9.50. For the medium term (1 month), the forecast ranges between $10.50 and $11.50. The bullish breakout is anticipated at $9.19, while the critical support level stands at $8.51.

data.title: Willis introduces new Reputational Risk Quantification Model for celebrity endorsements with data from Polecat.
data.description: In London on February 18, 2026, Willis, a WTW business listed on NASDAQ as WTW, unveiled its Reputational Risk Quantification Model for celebrity endorsement. This innovative model, utilizing data from Polecat, calculates the level of reputational risk tied to celebrity endorsers and brand ambassadors.

data.title: Metapack unveils new AI-powered tools for retailers to enhance delivery data control and clarity at The Delivery Conference 2026.
data.description: Metapack, a prominent intelligent delivery platform based in London, has introduced a cutting-edge set of AI-driven features. This comes as a response to the escalating complexity of fulfillment processes and the increasingly demanding expectations of customers. The latest advancements from Metapack empower retailers with real-time delivery data, enabling proactive issue prediction and swift decision-making to enhance delivery dependability and safeguard revenue. The unveiling of these innovations occurred at The Delivery Conference (TDC) 2026, showcasing their potential impact on the industry.

data.title: AVAX may reach $12-15 by March 2026 as per technical analysis, predictions, and market conditions.
data.description: Recent technical analysis indicates that Avalanche (AVAX) may experience a recovery from its current oversold state. With key support remaining strong and the Relative Strength Index (RSI) signaling neutral conditions, analysts are predicting price targets to range between $12 and $15. This suggests a potential uptrend in the near future for AVAX.

data.description: Solar A/S will hold its Annual General Meeting on Friday, March 13, 2026, at 11:00 am at Industrivej Vest 43, 6600 Vejen, Denmark.

data.title: Founders Fund, linked to Peter Thiel, sells all ETHZilla shares after holding 7.5% stake in 2025 - SEC filing.
data.description: Newly released SEC documents reveal that entities affiliated with Peter Thiel's Founders Fund no longer hold any shares in ETHZilla. This comes after the entities had previously disclosed a 7.5% ownership stake in the company back in 2025. The recent filing indicates that the Founders Fund entities have completely divested their holdings in ETHZilla.

data.title: Polkadot aims for $1.65 rebound despite weak signals; analysts foresee 77% gain to $2.74 by 2021.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot (DOT) is currently being traded at $1.36 and is experiencing bearish signals in terms of market momentum. However, analysts have predicted a potential 77% increase in value by the end of the year, with a target price of $2.74 to reach recovery levels.

data.title: MATIC tests $0.58 resistance for February recovery. Currently at $0.38, RSI at 38.00. Potential to reach $0.45-$0.52 if key resistance levels are broken soon.
data.description: The cryptocurrency MATIC is currently priced at $0.38 and has a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 38.00. Technical analysis indicates a possible uptrend to a range of $0.45 to $0.52 if Polygon manages to surpass important resistance levels in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: Monday.com improves AI agent testing speed by 8.7x with LangSmith integration - testing time reduced from 162 to 18 seconds.
data.description: A programming framework known as LangSmith, implemented by Monday Service, has significantly reduced the testing time for AI agents from 162 seconds to just 18 seconds. This improvement was achieved through an evaluation-driven development approach combined with parallel processing techniques.

data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogecoin is currently trading at $0.10 with stable momentum. Analysis of its technical indicators indicates a short-term price target of $0.11, with further potential to reach $0.16 by March 2026.

data.title: Pharmacelera secures €6M for U.S. expansion and platform advancement, led by Heran Partners, Clave Capital, Inveready, and Bio&Tech Smart Capital.
data.description: Pharmacelera secures a major investment round led by Heran Partners, along with participation from Clave Capital, Inveready, and Bio&Tech Smart Capital Financing. This funding will empower Pharmacelera to strengthen connections with key pharmaceutical and biotechnology clients in the United States. The company's platform, which explores a vast chemical 'exaSpace', will now be able to more precisely identify novel solutions.
